nodes.text:
# System Context — Internet Banking System

C4 Model · Level 1

## Legend

- **[Person]** — amber note
- **In-focus system** — green idea
- **[External]** — gray text
- Edges = intent verbs (no tech)

[Person] Personal Banking Customer
A customer of the bank.

[Software System] Internet Banking System
Lets customers view accounts and make payments.

[External] Mainframe Banking System
Stores core banking info about customers, accounts, transactions.

edges.label: Gets account info from, makes payments using
